title: Unauthorized access to customer database
description: Anomalous database queries detected from application server app-srv-03. Large volume of SELECT queries against the customers table including PII fields (email, phone, address, SSN). Queries originated from a compromised service account 'svc-analytics'.

indicators_of_compromise.context: External IP seen in auth logs for svc-analytics
Suspicious binary found in /tmp on app-srv-03

timeline_events.event: svc-analytics account authenticated from unusual IP 203.0.113.42
First anomalous query against customers table detected
Spike in outbound data transfer from app-srv-03 (2.3 GB)
SIEM alert triggered, incident reported to security team
Security team acknowledged and began initial assessment
